name: Manali-Leh Highway
description: The world's highest motorable road through Rohtang Pass and Baralacha La with breathtaking Himalayan views.

name: Spiti Valley Circuit
description: Remote Himalayan cold desert circuit through ancient monasteries and bone-dry valleys of Spiti.

name: Zanskar Valley Road
description: One of India's most treacherous roads through the remote Zanskar gorge accessible only in summer months.

name: Khardung La Pass
description: World's highest motorable pass at 5359m with stunning views of the Karakoram and Ladakh ranges.

name: Meghalaya Forest Roads
description: Winding roads through sacred groves and living root bridges in the wettest place on earth.

name: Ziro Valley Road
description: Scenic Arunachal road through Apatani tribal villages with rice fields and pine-covered hills.

name: Tawang Road from Dirang
description: Dramatic Arunachal Pradesh mountain road crossing Sela Pass at 4170m to the ancient Buddhist town.

name: Coorg Plantation Roads
description: Winding roads through endless coffee and spice plantations in India's Scotland with misty valley views.

name: Munnar Tea Estate Roads
description: Stunning roads through Kerala's high-altitude tea estates with views of the Western Ghats peaks.

name: Nubra Valley Road
description: Desert road through the high-altitude Nubra Valley past Bactrian camel dunes to the Siachen base.

name: Pangong Lake Road
description: Dramatic road to the high-altitude salt lake that changes colors from blue to green to red.

name: Turtuk Village Road
description: Remote road to India's last village before Pakistan in the Shyok Valley with apricot orchards.

name: Iceland F-roads Highland Circuit
description: Iceland's famous F-roads through the remote highland interior past volcanoes and glaciers.

name: Kjalvegur Route
description: Ancient highland route between two glaciers with geothermal hot springs and remote mountain huts.

name: Bolivian Death Road
description: The world's most dangerous road descending 3600m through cloud forest from the Andes to the Amazon.

name: Carretera Austral
description: Legendary Patagonian highway through pristine wilderness connecting remote communities by river ferries.

name: Pamir Highway
description: World's second highest international highway through the Pamirs with Soviet border posts and yurt camps.

name: Karakoram Highway
description: The eighth wonder of the world connecting China and Pakistan through spectacular Karakoram mountain scenery.

name: Moroccan Desert Piste
description: Off-piste desert driving through the Sahara dunes of Merzouga and Erg Chebbi to remote Berber camps.

name: Namibian Skeleton Coast
description: Remote desert coastline drive past shipwrecks, seal colonies and ancient Welwitschia plants.

name: Australian Outback Tracks
description: Remote outback tracks through red desert past Aboriginal sacred sites and ancient meteorite craters.

name: Cape York Peninsula
description: Australia's ultimate 4WD challenge to the continent's northernmost tip through tropical wilderness.

name: Trans-Himalayan Route
description: Epic motorcycle journey from Manali through Leh to Srinagar crossing some of the world's highest passes.

name: Rohtang Pass Road
description: Gateway to Lahaul and Spiti valleys with snow even in summer and dramatic mountain scenery.

name: Dzukou Valley Road
description: Rough Nagaland roads to the base of the stunning Dzukou Valley through dense jungle.

name: Gurez Valley Road
description: Remote Kashmir valley road crossing Razdan Pass to the untouched Gurez valley near the Line of Control.

name: Dooars Forest Roads
description: Wildlife safari roads through Bengal's terai forests with wild elephants, rhinos and leopards.

name: Munsiyari Road
description: Scenic Kumaon Himalaya road to Little Kashmir with views of Panchachuli peaks and Milam Glacier.

name: Champaner Road
description: Heritage road through Gujarat's UNESCO-listed medieval town amid Pavagadh hills and ancient mosques.

name: Moab Trail System
description: Utah's red rock off-road mecca with legendary trails like Hell's Revenge and Slickrock through canyon country.

name: Rubicon Trail
description: America's most famous and challenging off-road trail through Sierra Nevada granite with water crossings.

name: Dalton Highway
description: Remote Alaska highway to the Arctic Ocean crossing the Brooks Range through true wilderness.

name: Transfagarasan Highway
description: Top Gear's greatest road in the world zigzagging through the Carpathian Mountains past glacial lakes.

name: Stelvio Pass
description: Europe's highest paved mountain pass with 48 hairpin bends through the Italian Alps.

name: Trollstigen Road
description: Norway's iconic mountain road with 11 hairpin bends and a 180m waterfall cascading alongside.

name: Sani Pass
description: Steep 4WD-only pass climbing from KwaZulu-Natal into the Lesotho highlands to the highest pub in Africa.

name: Simien Mountains Road
description: Remote Ethiopian highland road past dramatic escarpments with Gelada baboon troops.

name: Wakhan Corridor
description: Remote mountain corridor between the Pamir and Hindu Kush with ancient Silk Road caravanserais.

name: Marsabit Road
description: Kenya's most isolated road through the Chalbi Desert to the remote forest oasis of Marsabit.

name: Bhutan Royal Highways
description: Scenic Bhutanese mountain roads through fortress dzongs and pine forests connecting ancient valley towns.

name: Kinnaur Kailash Circuit
description: Treacherous Kinnaur road cut into sheer cliffs above the Sutlej gorge past apple orchards and Buddhist monasteries.

name: Andaman Island Backroads
description: Exploring remote Andaman beaches and tribal reserve edges on scooters through jungle-lined coastal roads.

name: Leh-Srinagar Highway
description: Classic Himalayan motorcycle route through Zoji La pass connecting Ladakh to Kashmir Valley.

name: Darjeeling Hill Roads
description: Tea garden roads with Kangchenjunga views winding through Bengal's misty hill stations.

name: Garo Hills Circuit
description: Riding through Meghalaya's Garo Hills past sacred forests, waterfalls and Balpakram canyon.

name: Pelling to Yuksom Road
description: Ancient trade route road through Sikkim's cardamom forests to the starting point of the Dzongri trek.

name: Rann of Kutch Dirt Tracks
description: Salt flat exploration on the white Rann of Kutch under full moon nights in the world's largest salt desert.

name: Assam Tea Country Roads
description: Flat roads through the world's largest tea-producing region with river islands and Brahmaputra views.
